{"compiler":{"version":"0.8.19+commit.7dd6d404"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[{"anonymous":false,"inputs":[{"indexed":true,"internalType":"string","name":"ipfsCID","type":"string"},{"indexed":true,"internalType":"address","name":"author","type":"address"},{"indexed":false,"internalType":"uint256","name":"timestamp","type":"uint256"}],"name":"PaperSubmitted","type":"event"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"","type":"uint256"}],"name":"allCIDs","outputs":[{"internalType":"string","name":"","type":"string"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"string","name":"_ipfsCID","type":"string"}],"name":"getPaper","outputs":[{"internalType":"string","name":"ipfsCID","type":"string"},{"internalType":"address","name":"author","type":"address"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"timestamp","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"bool","name":"exists","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"string","name":"_ipfsCID","type":"string"}],"name":"paperExists","outputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"string","name":"_ipfsCID","type":"string"}],"name":"submitPaper","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"totalPapers","outputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"","type":"uint256"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"events":{"PaperSubmitted(string,address,uint256)":{"details":"Emitted every time a new paper is successfully registered.","params":{"author":"Address of the submitting author.","ipfsCID":"The IPFS CID of the uploaded paper.","timestamp":"Block timestamp of the submission."}}},"kind":"dev","methods":{"getPaper(string)":{"params":{"_ipfsCID":"The CID to look up."},"returns":{"author":"   The address that submitted the paper.","exists":"   Whether the paper exists in the registry.","ipfsCID":"  The stored CID (echoed back for convenience).","timestamp":"Unix timestamp of submission."}},"paperExists(string)":{"params":{"_ipfsCID":"CID to test."},"returns":{"_0":"True if the paper has already been registered."}},"submitPaper(string)":{"details":"Reverts if the CID has already been registered,         preventing any author from claiming precedence twice.","params":{"_ipfsCID":"The IPFS CID returned after uploading the PDF."}}},"title":"PaperRegistry","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"getPaper(string)":{"notice":"Retrieve the full record for a given CID."},"paperExists(string)":{"notice":"Quick existence check \u2014 useful for deduplication on the frontend."},"submitPaper(string)":{"notice":"Submit a paper CID to the registry."},"totalPapers()":{"notice":"Returns the total number of registered papers."}},"notice":"Proof of Precedence system for academic papers.         Each paper's IPFS CID is stored on-chain with the author's         address and the exact block timestamp \u2014 creating an immutable,         tamper-proof record of who published what, and when.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/PaperRegistry.sol":"PaperRegistry"},"evmVersion":"paris","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[]},"sources":{"contracts/PaperRegistry.sol":{"keccak256":"0xddf98a87da17018b843b08a7f170f7829faccc8632c346806899725fe91d6bba","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://f4f1c289e979db1c83053888836ea24e9dbe7e658c10a391d24db0c112b5af8e","dweb:/ipfs/QmP67ZQL5BvkWFBSBgmPENt4rHr9GaaRkaY8jWYK2JvtvK"]}},"version":1}
